name: Thermal Power Plant Basic Equipment Pack
description: Factory-capable coal-fired thermal power plant profile pack based on a campus-style plant layout with cooling towers, boiler and turbine island, coal handling, flue-gas cleanup, chimney, switchyard, and auxiliary buildings.

notes: Open-air square plant yard; omit perimeter walls so the site reads as an outdoor power station campus.
Reference-image layout: four large natural draft cooling towers in a 2x2 block on the left side, with the pump house immediately below them.
Do not lay the station out as two empty parallel rows; use stationPositions to form a dense campus block with equipment in the middle.
Central power block runs from coal mill to boiler, turbine hall, condenser, electrostatic precipitator, FGD absorber, and chimney.
Transformer and switchyard sit to the right and rear, while low auxiliary buildings occupy the foreground edge of the square yard.

stations.label: Natural draft cooling tower
stations.equipmentHint: thermal_power.natural_draft_cooling_tower hyperboloid natural draft cooling tower cluster with flared shell, top opening, basin, and cooling water pipe

stations.label: Boiler island
stations.equipmentHint: thermal_power.boiler_island tall coal-fired boiler island with furnace casing, steam drum, burner openings, forced draft blower, steam header, and flue gas duct

stations.label: Steam turbine generator
stations.equipmentHint: thermal_power.steam_turbine_generator turbine hall equipment with long turbine casing, generator body, shaft coupling, steam inlet pipe, and lube oil skid

stations.label: Surface condenser
stations.equipmentHint: thermal_power.surface_condenser horizontal surface condenser shell and tube heat exchanger with cooling water inlet outlet, condensate pump, and vacuum pipe

stations.label: Electrostatic precipitator
stations.equipmentHint: thermal_power.electrostatic_precipitator rectangular flue gas dust collector with box casing, ash hoppers, inlet outlet ducts, transformer cabinets, and access platforms

stations.label: FGD absorber
stations.equipmentHint: thermal_power.fgd_absorber wet flue gas desulfurization absorber tower with cylindrical vessel, inlet duct, outlet duct, recirculation pipe manifold, and service platform

stations.label: Plant chimney stack
stations.equipmentHint: thermal_power.chimney_stack tall plant chimney stack with concrete shell, warning bands, flue inlet duct, and base plinth

stations.label: Generator step-up transformer
stations.equipmentHint: thermal_power.generator_step_up_transformer large power transformer with radiator fins, oil tank body, bushings, cable tray, and containment base

stations.label: High voltage switchyard
stations.equipmentHint: thermal_power.switchyard outdoor high voltage switchyard with gantry frames, bus bars, insulators, breaker cabinets, and outgoing transmission lines

stations.label: Warehouse and maintenance workshop
stations.equipmentHint: thermal_power.warehouse_workshop maintenance workshop building with long hall body, roof panels, access doors, vent slats, and loading apron

stations.label: Control room and DCS building
stations.equipmentHint: thermal_power.control_room occupied control room and DCS building placed away from boiler and switchyard, with building body, roof, doors, windows, panels, and cable entry

stations.label: Water treatment building
stations.equipmentHint: thermal_power.water_treatment_building low water treatment building with tanks, pipe manifold, pump skid, control panel, doors, and roof vents

stations.label: Fly ash silo
stations.equipmentHint: thermal_power.fly_ash_silo fly ash storage silo with cylindrical bin, conical hopper bottom, support frame, discharge spout, and dust vent

stations.label: Coal pulverizer mill
stations.equipmentHint: thermal_power.coal_pulverizer_mill coal pulverizer mill with grinding body, feeder inlet, pulverized fuel outlet pipe, classifier, and drive motor

stations.label: Coal handling conveyor
stations.equipmentHint: thermal_power.coal_handling_conveyor long elevated belt conveyor gallery with rollers, transfer chute, drive motor, and enclosed support frame

stations.label: Coal yard stockpile
stations.equipmentHint: thermal_power.coal_yard_stockpile coal storage yard stockpile with long dark coal pile, stacker conveyor, reclaim hopper, and runoff trench

stations.label: Circulating water pump house
stations.equipmentHint: thermal_power.circulating_water_pump_house low pump house with pump casings, intake pipe manifold, discharge pipe, and electrical control cabinet

devices.name: Natural draft cooling tower
devices.description: Four squat, wide hyperboloid natural-draft cooling towers arranged as a 2x2 block on the left side of the thermal power plant, matching the provided reference image more closely than the earlier 3x3 cluster.
visualCues: shared square basin and water header

devices.name: Circulating water pump house
devices.description: Low utility building and pump skid that sends cooling water between condenser and cooling towers.

devices.name: Coal yard stockpile
devices.description: Coal storage yard with dark stockpile mass and reclaim/stacking equipment.

devices.name: Coal handling conveyor
devices.description: Long elevated belt conveyor gallery feeding coal from yard to the central fuel preparation area.

devices.name: Coal pulverizer mill
devices.description: Mill that grinds coal to fine powder before it is sent to the furnace burners.

devices.name: Coal-fired boiler island
devices.description: Tall central boiler block with furnace casing, steam drum/header, burners, draft blower, and flue gas outlet.
visualCues: flue gas duct to cleanup train

devices.name: Steam turbine generator
devices.description: Long turbine-generator train inside a turbine hall, forming the main generation block beside the boiler island.
visualCues: long turbine and generator train visible at the hall face
simple walls and roof massing like the reference image low industrial buildings

devices.name: Surface condenser
devices.description: Horizontal condenser vessel below the turbine that condenses exhaust steam using circulating cooling water.
visualCues: simple walls and roof massing like the reference image low industrial buildings

devices.name: Electrostatic precipitator
devices.description: Rectangular flue-gas dust collector placed between the furnace flue outlet and desulfurization system.
visualCues: inlet and outlet flue gas ducts

devices.name: Wet FGD absorber tower
devices.description: Wet flue-gas desulfurization absorber tower between precipitator and chimney.

devices.name: Plant chimney stack
devices.description: Tall flue gas stack visible near the central power block in the reference image.

devices.name: Fly ash silo
devices.description: Bulk fly ash storage silo downstream of electrostatic precipitator.

devices.name: Water treatment building
devices.description: Auxiliary water treatment building for demineralized makeup water and plant wastewater streams.
visualCues: simple walls and roof massing like the reference image low industrial buildings

devices.name: Generator step-up transformer
devices.description: Large transformer between generator output and the outdoor switchyard.

devices.name: High voltage switchyard
devices.description: Outdoor switchyard and transmission export area visible around the plant site.

devices.name: Control room and DCS building
devices.description: Occupied control building for plant operations and distributed control systems.
visualCues: simple walls and roof massing like the reference image low industrial buildings

devices.name: Warehouse and maintenance workshop
devices.description: Auxiliary workshop and warehouse building in the foreground of the reference layout.
visualCues: simple walls and roof massing like the reference image low industrial buildings
